title: Portfolio Heat Monitor with Correlation-Adjusted Exposure Cap
summary: Before any new order is submitted, compute the portfolio's total correlation-adjusted heat: sum each open position's dollar-risk, then scale by √(N × avg_pairwise_correlation) to get effective heat as a % of NAV. Block new orders that would push effective heat above a configurable threshold (default 5% for conservative, 8% for aggressive profiles). This is the single most-cited failure mode in retail and early-stage algo trading — positions that look diversified by ticker are often highly correlated and create cluster risk during sector events.
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
